jp: ミカはイヌを2匹飼っています．
model: Mika has two dogs.

jp: リョウタはたいてい自転車で学校に行きます．
model: Ryota usually goes to school by bike.

jp: 地球は太陽の周りを回っている．
model: The earth moves around the sun.
alts: The earth goes around the sun.

jp: ピーターは若いころはとても内気だった．
model: Peter was very shy when he was young.

jp: メグに会いましたか．― ええ，図書館で会いました．
model: Did you see Meg? Yes, I saw her in the library.
alts: meetは初対面・約束して会う

jp: 私はたいてい夏休みをおじの家で過ごしました．
model: I usually spent my summer vacations at my uncle’s house.

jp: 2，3週間たてば，木の葉は紅葉するでしょう．
model: The leaves will turn red in two or three weeks.

jp: 来年は何歳になりますか．― 16歳になります．
model: How old will you be next year? I’ll be sixteen.

jp: よし，ぼくがやろう．
model: All right, I’ll do it.
alts: All right, I will do it.

jp: 明日歯医者さんに診てもらおうと思っています．
model: I’m going to see the dentist tomorrow.
alts: I am going to see the dentist tomorrow.

jp: 黒い雲が出てきた．雨になりそうだ．
model: Black clouds are gathering.  It’s going to rain.

jp: 試験は今度の月曜に［月曜から］始まります．
model: The exams begin next Monday.

jp: もし明日雨が降れば，私たちはタクシーで行きます．
model: If it rains tomorrow, we’ll go by taxi.

jp: 何をしているの．― 旅行の計画を立てているんだ．
model: What are you doing? I’m making travel plans.

jp: 君はいつもスマホばかり見ているね．〔他に何かしてはどうか〕
model: You’re always looking at your smartphone.
alts: You are always looking at your smartphone.

jp: 今度の日曜日にジムの送別会を開きます．
model: We’re giving a farewell party for Jim next Sunday.
alts: We’re having a farewell party for Jim next Sunday.|We are giving a farewell party for Jim next Sunday.|We are having a farewell party for Jim next Sunday.

jp: 昨夜あなたが電話をしてきたとき，私はテレビドラマを見ていました．
model: When you called me last night, I was watching a TV drama.

jp: 子供のころ，彼らはいつもお互いに口げんかをしていた．
model: In their childhood they were always quarreling with each other.
alts: When they were children, they were always quarreling with each other.|When they were children, they were always arguing with each other.|In their childhood they were always arguing with each other.

jp: 大統領はその日の晩にテレビのインタビューに答えることになっていた．
model: The President was giving an interview on TV that evening.
alts: The President was to give an interview on TV that evening.|The President was scheduled to give an interview on TV that evening.

jp: 私たちは明日の今ごろは太平洋上を飛んでいることでしょう．
model: We will be flying over the Pacific about this time tomorrow.
alts: We'll be flying over the Pacific about this time tomorrow.

jp: 父は来週ヨーロッパに向けて出発することになります．
model: My father will be leaving for Europe next week.
